results: API route and OpenAPI schema bind EntityPolicyMapResponse.
Repository buckets separate award, obligation, ceiling, regulation, lobbying and trade_restriction semantics.
Frontend local fallback and server hydration expose the same policy buckets.
Integration assertions keep award ceilings and obligations semantically distinct.
non_claims: Does not implement the full policy/government G8 view A111.
Does not certify production-reviewed government contract or lobbying facts.
Does not close A202, A209, A210, A026/A027, A204/A205 or MVP release readiness.
